movesList.name: Dashing Jump
inputs: press up-forward while dashing or running

movesList.name: Safe Fall
inputs: press any button when you hit the ground

movesList.name: Throw / Crouching Throw
inputs: press ab when standing or crouching

movesList.name: Throw From Behind
inputs: press ab when standing behind your enemy

movesList.name: Roll into Background
inputs: press m when lying on the ground

movesList.name: Kuuchuu Yoku Idou
inputs: hold g during fuyuu  (can move in / out)

movesList.name: Last Shooting
inputs: press a after throwing foe from behind

movesList.name: Sky Javelin
inputs: press in any direction ak x2 ([[air]])
